title: Tool Design, Errors, Pagination, and Context Efficiency · Protocol Recall
summary: Refine an MCP server whose tools are ambiguous and return too much data. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for an efficient tool API and evaluation suite after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose tool granularity that maps to meaningful user intent without unsafe generic execution.
Write discriminative descriptions, constrained schemas, examples, and side-effect metadata.
Return actionable domain errors without exposing secrets or stack internals.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

# Add typed, bounded protocol increments below.

steps.title: Tool Granularity · changed case
steps.instruction:
Use a changed review case derived from this module: agent ext tool quality. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Use a changed review case derived from this module: agent ext tool quality. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. Which action demonstrates Tool Granularity without dropping earlier contracts?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for choose tool granularity that maps to meaningful user intent without unsafe generic execution.

content.text: Choose tool granularity that maps to meaningful user intent without unsafe generic execution. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: agent ext tool quality. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Tool Granularity, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to an efficient tool API and evaluation suite.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: More tiny tools always improve selection. This fails the Tool Granularity contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
Use a changed review case derived from this module: agent ext tool quality. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

stimulus.title: Tool Evals case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: agent ext tool quality. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Handler unit tests measure agent usability.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Evaluate selection, argument construction, recovery, context cost, and side-effect accuracy. Artifact under review: an efficient tool API and evaluation suite.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Tool Evals, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Tool Evals applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Evaluate selection, argument construction, recovery, context cost, and side-effect accuracy.
